caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses stands against a solid black background, speaking directly to the camera. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring red floral embroidery and a decorative neckline, paired with a dark necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her shirt. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expressions shift; her mouth opens and closes as she speaks, and her gaze remains focused forward. Her posture remains steady throughout the clip, with only slight movements in her head and facial muscles as she articulates her words. The lighting is consistent, illuminating her face and clothing while keeping the background entirely dark.
